title: SpaceX conducts the largest IPO in history and its shares reach $135
summary: SpaceX's initial public offering creates a huge stir in the markets and turns thousands of employees into millionaires.

title: Deezer launches a free tool to detect AI-generated music in playlists
summary: The app allows identifying artificially created songs on platforms like Spotify and Apple Music.

title: Anthropic presents Claude Fable 5, its most advanced AI model, with controversy over its safeguards
summary: The model shows superior performance in coding and its protections were adjusted after initial criticism.

title: The Trump Mobile T1 is actually an HTC U24 Pro with cosmetic and software modifications
summary: Researchers discover that the phone promoted as American is a rebadged Chinese model.

title: Spanish startup Theker raises 74 million euros to compete with China in industrial robotics
summary: Theker develops versatile industrial robots and its funding round reaches $85 million according to sources.

title: OpenAI acquires Ona to bring secure cloud technology to its Codex coding platform
summary: The acquisition will allow OpenAI to enhance its autonomous coding agents with secure cloud storage.

title: Oracle warns of a zero-day vulnerability in PeopleSoft exploited by ShinyHunters to steal data
summary: The hacker group took advantage of the flaw to access systems of universities and more than 100 companies.

title: Jeff Bezos' startup Prometheus closes a $12 billion round to create a physical 'AI engineer'
summary: With a valuation of $41 billion, Prometheus seeks to develop an artificial intelligence capable of interacting with the real world.

title: Google sues a Chinese AI fraud network and OpenAI blocks accounts linked to influence campaigns
summary: Both companies take legal and technical measures to dismantle disinformation operations backed by China.

title: Massive outage of Facebook, Instagram and Messenger due to a failure in Meta's servers
summary: Meta's services were inaccessible for several hours, affecting users globally.

title: Chrome blocks Manifest V2 extensions, rendering uBlock Origin and other tools ineffective
summary: The migration to Manifest V3 limits the ad-blocking and tracker-blocking capabilities in the browser.

title: US surveillance law expires for the first time after rejection of Trump's candidate to lead intelligence agencies
summary: Congress fails to reach an agreement to renew the legislation, representing a shift in surveillance policy.

title: Mistral AI seeks 3 billion euros to compete in artificial intelligence from Europe
summary: The French startup plans to use the funds to develop AI models and reduce dependence on US companies.

title: UK proposes scanning mobile phones without judicial authorization, raising privacy alarms
summary: The bill would allow authorities to review messages and files for illegal content.

title: Water crisis threatens TSMC's production more than competition
summary: Water scarcity becomes the main challenge for the Taiwanese semiconductor manufacturer.

title: China cuts tungsten supply to Japan, affecting Samsung and SK Hynix memory manufacturing
summary: The export restriction of this critical mineral impacts the semiconductor supply chain.

title: James Webb telescope detects a star containing a black hole inside, a theoretical object confirmed
summary: The discovery validates an astrophysical prediction and opens new avenues for the study of black holes.

title: FDA approves a new treatment for depression without the need for medication
summary: The innovative therapy offers a non-pharmaceutical alternative for patients with depressive disorder.

title: German court holds Google responsible for false responses from its AI Overviews
summary: The ruling establishes that AI-generated summaries are Google's own content and can be sued for errors.

title: Bluesky introduces group chats and strengthens its bet on social features
summary: The decentralized social network adds group messaging while seeking to differentiate itself from other platforms.
